mission.title: keycloak: Fix for missing object representation in admin event log when deleting user, group, client
mission.description:
Fix for missing object representation in admin event log when deleting user, group, client

Closes #33009

resolution.summary:
> Thanks, @JakubWoo. I see what you are trying to achieve by making delete admin events for clients, groups, and users, consistent with other resources from authorization services.
> 
> Despite that, is there any other use case you are trying to solve when processing delete events for these resources and using their representation?

Yes. Some organizations find this critical to keep deleted user information in the admin log for audit purpose. There is no other way of retrieving details of deleted user than admin log user representation, since user does not exist any more.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
